[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000000 1
1 01110101 5
2 00111100 4
3 00001000 1
4 10011100 4
5 10111101 6
6 10001010 3
7 00010101 3

01 10 01111111 7
12 21 01101111 6
23 32 01110101 5 match 1
34 43 00111100 4 match 2
45 54 10111110 6
56 65 10011111 6
67 76 11111111 a
70 07 11111111 a

02 20 01110101 5 match 1
13 31 01111110 6
24 42 01111101 6
35 53 10111110 6
46 64 10111101 6 match 5
57 75 11111111 a
60 06 11111101 7
71 17 11111111 a

03 30 01110101 5 match 1
14 41 01111110 6
25 52 11001011 5
36 63 10111101 6 match 5
47 74 11111111 a
50 05 11111111 a
61 16 11111111 a
72 27 11111111 a

04 40 01111101 6
15 51 11101110 6
26 62 11011101 6
37 73 11111111 a
